title: Wonders Of The World: A ZAWA Addon
description: Java Mod for 1.16.5, Addon to the ZAWA: Evolved mod. Requires ZAWA: Evolved to use.
body:
### **Wonders Of The World: A ZAWA Evolved Addon**

WOTW required ZAWA Evolved to function, ensure you download it before using the mod!


**General Info**
Wonders of the World is a ZAWA addon released in 2024 that showcases not only a wide range of recognisable "zoo species", but also lesser-known species barely in the limelight of modern media. Each animal is made in the ZAWA-Evolved style and is made as realisitc as possible by the Development team.

**Animal Roster**
WOTW can be used alongside various other mods alongside its required dependancy of ZAWA-Evolved. For Example, The Lil Critters, Essentials & Eco Regions Addons and other animal mods such as Frik's Fauna. WOTW itself has a focous on Hoofstock and Felines, however also features a plethora of other species, summarising in a total of 31 animals & 76 Species.

**Staff Team & Credits **
We have an amazing team at Wonders Of The World, headfronted by Crossy as Owner/Coder and Arty as Lead Assets! We have worked very closely with other ZAWA team members aswell.

*Staff Team*
Owner: HelloCrossy67
Lead Assets: Arty
Developer: heavy808s
Developer: chilotic
Developer: SpiggitySpag
Developer: pumpkinedpatch

*Other Credits*
